title: सीता कवचम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री सीता कवचम् ॥

ॐ अस्य श्री सीताकवचस्तोत्रमन्त्रस्य।
वाल्मीकि ऋषिः। अनुष्टुप् छन्दः।
श्रीसीतादेवी देवता। सीताप्रीत्यर्थे जपे विनियोगः॥

सीता मे पातु शीर्षं च ललाटं जानकी तथा।
नेत्रे रामप्रिया पातु श्रवणे मिथिलेश्वरी॥ १॥

नासिकां वैदेही पातु वदनं भूमिजा तथा।
कण्ठं राघववल्लभा स्कन्धौ रामसहचरी॥ २॥

भुजौ अयोध्यारानी मे करौ पातु पतिव्रता।
हृदयं रामहृदया कुक्षिं लवकुशप्रसूः॥ ३॥

कटिं धर्मपत्नी पातु जानुनी लङ्काविमुक्ता।
जङ्घे अग्निपरीक्षिता पादौ पद्मावती तथा॥ ४॥

सर्वाङ्गं श्रीमहालक्ष्मी प्राच्यां पातु जनकजा।
दक्षिणे रामवामाङ्गी पश्चिमे सुन्दरी तथा॥ ५॥

उत्तरे भूमिनन्दिनी ऊर्ध्वं पातु सनातनी।
अधस्तात् पातु वैदेही सर्वत्र सीता ऽवतु॥ ६॥

य इदं कवचं दिव्यं सीतायाः परमात्मनः।
पठेत् प्रातः समुत्थाय सर्वसौभाग्यमाप्नुयात्॥ ७॥

॥ इति श्री सीता कवचम् सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Sita Kavacham ||

Om Asya Shri Sita Kavacha Stotra Mantrasya |
Valmiki Rishih | Anushtup Chhandah |
Shri Sita Devi Devata | Sita Prityarthe Jape Viniyogah ||

Sita Me Patu Shirsham Cha Lalatam Janaki Tatha |
Netre Ramapriya Patu Shravane Mithileshvari || 1 ||

Nasikam Vaidehi Patu Vadanam Bhumija Tatha |
Kantham Raghavavallabha Skandhau Ramasahachari || 2 ||

Bhujau Ayodhyarani Me Karau Patu Pativrata |
Hridayam Ramahridaya Kukshim Lavakushaprasuh || 3 ||

Katim Dharmapatni Patu Januni Lankavimuktaa |
Janghe Agniparikshita Padau Padmavati Tatha || 4 ||

Sarvangam Shri Mahalakshmi Prachyam Patu Janakaja |
Dakshine Ramavaamangi Pashchime Sundari Tatha || 5 ||

Uttare Bhuminandini Urdhvam Patu Sanatani |
Adhastat Patu Vaidehi Sarvatra Sita Avatu || 6 ||

Ya Idam Kavacham Divyam Sitayah Paramatmanah |
Pathet Pratah Samutthaya Sarvasaubhagyam Aapnuyaat || 7 ||

|| Iti Shri Sita Kavacham Sampurnam ||
hindiMeaning:
श्री सीता कवच — सभी अंगों और दिशाओं की रक्षा के लिए।

मस्तक की रक्षा सीता करें, ललाट की जानकी, नेत्रों की रामप्रिया।

हृदय की रक्षा रामहृदया, कुक्षि की लवकुशप्रसू, पादों की पद्मावती।

सर्वांग की श्री महालक्ष्मी, सभी दिशाओं में जनकजा, रामवामांगी, भूमिनन्दिनी।

इस दिव्य कवच को प्रातः पढ़ने से सर्वसौभाग्य प्राप्त होता है।
benefits: Divine armor of Mata Sita for complete protection
Invokes Sita as Mahalakshmi for all auspiciousness
Grants marital harmony and pativrata shakti
Bestows saubhagya (good fortune) to women devotees
Ideal for Sita Navami, Vivah Panchami, and Ram Navami
description: Among the most cherished prayers to Goddess Sita, Sita Kavacham (सीता कवचम्) stands as a divine armor prayer for protection. Attributed to Ananda Ramayana, this prayer holds a special place in Hindu devotional literature. Chanting this stotra with devotion is said to grant marital harmony and pativrata shakti as well as bestow saubhagya (good fortune) to women devotees. Additionally, it is known to invoke Sita as Mahalakshmi for all auspiciousness. For best results, devotees chant this on Friday (Shukravar) and during Sita Navami, Vivah Panchami, and Ram Navami. With 7 verses and a reading time of about 4 minutes, this prayer is ideal for both daily worship and special occasions. On this page, you can read the complete Sita Kavacham in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Sita Kavacham in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Divine armor of Mata Sita for protection, saubhagya, and marital harmony.
